side_effects.description: Experiencing flushing with BPC/TB500 stack. Ruled out other peptides by stopping them. Reconstituted with Hospira bacteriostatic water. Only began flushing in the last two sessions; previous round was fine.

protocol_notes: Reconstituted with Hospira bacteriostatic water. Flushing only appeared in the last two administrations despite a previous round without issues. Eliminated other peptides as variables.
